title: Frogrinth launchuh'
description: Modrinth launcher parody made within Minecraft! - possible with FancyMenu
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)

# What is this modpack?

This modpack is a _silly_ **parody recreation of the Modrinth Launcher**, it is not very functional but it has a few cool features yo mimick the launcher and can play a random superflat world.

Frogrinth Launchuh' is not very useful as of right now and **I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS BEING YOUR "MAIN" PACK**.

# Check out our other packs!

If you think this was impressive, **this took 4 hours total and 1 developer** to make.

We have a pack we have spent nearly 2 years making and actively updating, its called **Butterium** and you can **download it  on modrinth [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/butterium)**.
